creator: foxfair@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ran a few quick test and got this error:

www/apache22
> pkg_deps
/usr/local/sbin/pkg_deps: arith: syntax error: "PKG_COUNT+1"

security/aide
> pkg_deps
/usr/local/sbin/pkg_deps: arith: syntax error: "PKG_COUNT+1"
> grep _DEPENDS Makefile
LIB_DEPENDS=    mhash.2:${PORTSDIR}/security/mhash


  Any idea? :)

Cheers,
foxfair
